prompt: Create an ultra-tall vertical photorealistic image, about 1:4 aspect ratio, showing a massive silver heavy-lift rocket launching straight upward from a launch pad. Center the rocket perfectly against a nearly pure white overexposed sky, with the nose cone near the top and the base near the lower middle. The vehicle should have exactly 3 visible cylindrical rocket bodies: 1 taller central core and 2 slightly shorter side boosters, all metallic silver with dark black bands and subtle panel seams. Show exactly 4 bright engine flames beneath the rocket, forming long vertical white-hot orange exhaust streams. At the lower left, include one tall rust-orange steel launch tower with lattice scaffolding, partially engulfed by light and smoke. The bottom third of the frame should be filled with enormous rolling clouds of dense launch smoke and dust in white, gray, peach, and orange, lit intensely by the engines. Use dramatic high-key lighting, extreme brightness, realistic heat haze, sparks, debris specks, and a cinematic space-launch photography style. Keep the composition minimal and vertically stretched, emphasizing the rocket’s height and the towering plume; no text, no logos, no people, no borders.
